messages.content:
Create an interesting “choose your own adventure” game for me to play through. I’ll be picking from choices you give me. Some of them are in my favour and some of them are not. Stats like an attack's "Success Chance" or "Escape Chance" influence those choices too. The outcome is only revealed after I make my choice.

I play as Christian Vaughn, the main character of this fighting game similar to Streets of Rage, Final Fight etc.

The player character aswell as the enemies have hitpoints. When reduced to 0, the character is knocked out.

The characters rotate between being on the offense and on the defense.

---

Player Character:

Christian Vaughn: 

Hitpoints: 120

Move List: 

Normal Moves:
- Straight Punch (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
- Body Blow (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
- Uppercut (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
- Thrust Kick (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
- Low Kick (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
- Shoulder Throw (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
- Suplex (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage)
- Headlock (70% Success Chance, 5 Damage per Round, 70% Escape Chance, Recipient is locked in a submission)

Special Moves: 
- Clothesline (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage, Recipient Dizzy for 1 round)
- Spear Tackle (50% Success Chance, 25 Damage, Recipient Stunned for 1 round)
- Powerbomb (30% Success Chance, 35 Damage)

Move Attrbutes:
- Damage/Damage per Round: The amount of hitpoints removed by the attack
- Success Chance: The likelihood of the attack landing.
- Escape Chance: The likelihood of escaping from the submissin hold
- Side Effect: Special Moves have lingering side effects, buffing the attacker or debuffing the recipient

---

Level: Elite School

Enemies:

Naughty Cheerleader

Hitpoints: 40

Move List: 

Normal Moves:
- Slap (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
- Elbow Smash (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
- Axe Kick (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
- High Kick (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
- Low Kick (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
- Spinning Kick (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
- Hurricanrana (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage)
- Bodyscissors (60% Success Chance, 10 Damage per Round, 60% Escape Chance, Recipient is locked in a submission)

Special Moves: 
- Acrobatic Flip Kick (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage, Attacker and Allies are Energized for 2 rounds)
- Standing Headscissors (40% Success Chance, 20 Damage per Round, 40% Escape Chance, , Recipient is locked in a submission)
- Frontal Headscissors (30% Success Chance, 25 Damage per Round, 30% Escape Chance, , Recipient is locked in a submission)

---

I fight 3 Naughty Cheerleaderst the same time. They taunt me, while trying to knock me out. I win by knocking out all enemies.

End every post with several choices for me to pick from, not revealing their outcome to me.

Round 1:

The fight begins! Naughty Cheerleader #1 taunts you by making a rude gesture while Naughty Cheerleader #2 blows you a sarcastic kiss. Naughty Cheerleader #3 giggles smugly as they all circle around you. It's your turn to attack.

Choose your attack:

A: Straight Punch at Naughty Cheerleader #1
B: Thrust Kick at Naughty Cheerleader #2
C: Shoulder Throw against Naughty Cheerleader #3
A: Straight Punch at Naughty Cheerleader #1

You quickly react and throw a Straight Punch at Naughty Cheerleader #1. With an 80% success chance, you manage to land the punch. Naughty Cheerleader #1 takes 10 damage.

Naughty Cheerleader #1's HP: 30/40

The Naughty Cheerleaders retaliate!

Naughty Cheerleader #1 tries to slap you while Naughty Cheerleader #2 goes for a low kick, and Naughty Cheerleader #3 attempts a spinning kick. However, you manage to dodge the slap and block the low kick but get hit by the spinning kick which deals 15 damage.

Christian Vaughn's HP: 105/120

Round 2:

Now it's your turn to attack again. What do you want to do?

A: Uppercut at Naughty Cheerleader #1
B: Body Blow at Naughty Cheerleader #2
C: Powerbomb against Naughty Cheerleader #3 (Special Move)
C: Powerbomb against Naughty Cheerleader #3 (Special Move)

You decide to go for the Powerbomb against Naughty Cheerleader #3. With a 30% success chance, you struggle to execute the move and unfortunately, you don't manage to pull it off. Naughty Cheerleader #3 evades your attack and smirks.

The Naughty Cheerleaders capitalize on your failed attack!

Naughty Cheerleader #1 goes for an elbow smash, Naughty Cheerleader #2 tries a high kick, and Naughty Cheerleader #3 attempts a hurricanrana. You get hit by the elbow smash and high kick which deal a total of 20 damage.

Christian Vaughn's HP: 85/120

Round 3:

It's time to step up your game! What do you want to do?

A: Suplex against Naughty Cheerleader #1
B: Clothesline against Naughty Cheerleader #2 (Special Move)
C: Headlock on Naughty Cheerleader #3
A: Suplex against Naughty Cheerleader #1

You decide to attempt a Suplex against Naughty Cheerleader #1. With a 60% success chance, you manage to execute the move perfectly, picking her up and slamming her to the ground! Naughty Cheerleader #1 takes 20 damage.

Naughty Cheerleader #1's HP: 10/40

The Naughty Cheerleaders strike back!

Naughty Cheerleader #1, in pain, tries to slap you again. Meanwhile, Naughty Cheerleader #2 goes for a spinning kick, and Naughty Cheerleader #3 attempts an axe kick. You dodge Naughty Cheerleader #1's slap, but the spinning kick and axe kick hit you, dealing a total of 30 damage.

Christian Vaughn's HP: 55/120

Round 4:

You need to keep pressing your advantage. What do you want to do?

A: Straight Punch at Naughty Cheerleader #1
B: Spear Tackle against Naughty Cheerleader #2 (Special Move)
C: Low Kick at Naughty Cheerleader #3
A: Straight Punch at Naughty Cheerleader #1

You decide to throw another Straight Punch at the weakened Naughty Cheerleader #1. With an 80% success chance, you manage to land the punch, and Naughty Cheerleader #1 gets knocked out!

Naughty Cheerleader #1's HP: 0/40 (Knocked Out!)

Now it's the remaining Naughty Cheerleaders' turn to attack!

Naughty Cheerleader #2 tries a low kick, and Naughty Cheerleader #3 attempts an elbow smash. Your reflexes kick in, and you dodge the low kick, but the elbow smash connects, dealing 10 damage.

Christian Vaughn's HP: 45/120

Round 5:

You've knocked out one of them! Keep it up! What do you want to do next?

A: Thrust Kick at Naughty Cheerleader #2
B: Shoulder Throw against Naughty Cheerleader #3
C: Powerbomb against Naughty Cheerleader #3 (Special Move)
C: Powerbomb against Naughty Cheerleader #3 (Special Move)

You decide to try the Powerbomb against Naughty Cheerleader #3 once more. With a 30% success chance, you muster all your strength and, against the odds, successfully execute the move! Naughty Cheerleader #3 takes an impressive 35 damage.

Naughty Cheerleader #3's HP: 5/40

The remaining Naughty Cheerleaders are getting desperate!

Naughty Cheerleader #2 attempts an acrobatic flip kick (Special Move), and Naughty Cheerleader #3 tries a hurricanrana. Both attacks connect, dealing a combined 25 damage, and Naughty Cheerleader #2 and her ally are now Energized for the next 2 rounds.

Christian Vaughn's HP: 20/120

Round 6:

You're getting closer to victory, but you can't let your guard down. What do you want to do?

A: Uppercut at Naughty Cheerleader #2
B: Body Blow at Naughty Cheerleader #3
C: Clothesline against Naughty Cheerleader #2 (Special Move)
B: Body Blow at Naughty Cheerleader #3

You focus on Naughty Cheerleader #3 and deliver a swift Body Blow. With a 90% success chance, your attack lands perfectly, dealing 5 damage to your target.

Naughty Cheerleader #3's HP: 0/40 (Knocked Out!)

With only one Naughty Cheerleader remaining, the tables have turned in your favor!

However, Naughty Cheerleader #2, still energized, unleashes a powerful spinning kick. The attack connects and deals 15 damage.

Christian Vaughn's HP: 5/120

Round 7:

One more Naughty Cheerleader to defeat! What do you want to do?

A: Clothesline against Naughty Cheerleader #2 (Special Move)
B: Straight Punch at Naughty Cheerleader #2
C: Suplex against Naughty Cheerleader #2
C: Suplex against Naughty Cheerleader #2

You focus all your remaining energy and attempt a Suplex against Naughty Cheerleader #2. With a 60% success chance, you manage to grab her and execute the move, slamming her to the ground. Naughty Cheerleader #2 takes 20 damage.

Naughty Cheerleader #2's HP: 20/40

The last Naughty Cheerleader is clearly feeling the pressure now!

Naughty Cheerleader #2, still energized but desperate, attempts a high kick at you. You grit your teeth and just barely manage to evade the attack, remaining standing with your last ounce of strength.

Christian Vaughn's HP: 5/120

Round 8:

It's time to finish this! What do you want to do?

A: Uppercut at Naughty Cheerleader #2
B: Thrust Kick at Naughty Cheerleader #2
C: Shoulder Throw against Naughty Cheerleader #2
C: Shoulder Throw against Naughty Cheerleader #2

You decide to use a Shoulder Throw against the last remaining Naughty Cheerleader. With a 70% success chance, you courageously execute the move, tossing Naughty Cheerleader #2 to the ground. She takes 15 damage.

Naughty Cheerleader #2's HP: 5/40

She manages to get up, looking beaten and bruised but not yet defeated. Naughty Cheerleader #2 musters her strength for one last attack, attempting a low kick against you!

Miraculously, you manage to dodge her final desperate attempt!

Christian Vaughn's HP: 5/120

Round 9:

This is it! Time to finish the fight!

A: Straight Punch at Naughty Cheerleader #2
B: Low Kick at Naughty Cheerleader #2
C: Body Blow at Naughty Cheerleader #2
A: Straight Punch at Naughty Cheerleader #2

Gathering your remaining strength, you decide to finish the fight with a Straight Punch aimed at Naughty Cheerleader #2. With an 80% success chance, your punch connects and deals a solid 10 damage.

Naughty Cheerleader #2's HP: 0/40 (Knocked Out!)

Victory!

You've won the fight, having defeated all three Naughty Cheerleaders! They're lying on the ground, exhausted and defeated. Congratulations, Christian Vaughn, you've conquered the Elite School level!

Be prepared to face new challenges and enemies in your next fighting adventure!
